news.t: Gladius Capital Management launches Wayfinder ETFs Suite

overview.description: The Wayfinder Dynamic U.S. Interest Rate ETF (CMBO) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is actively managed and uses options box spreads to provide or exceed the price and yield performance of the rolling 012-month segment of the US Treasury Bill market. CMBO was launched on Nov 4, 2025 and is issued by Wayfinder.

data.title: Gladius Capital Management launches Wayfinder ETFs Suite
data.text: PARK CITY, Utah--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Gladius Capital Management, a derivatives-based investment firm with approximately $2.8 billion in assets under management, announces the launch of its Wayfinder ETFs...
